title: Sorting in task board
excerpt: When an project/board is created, each new one just goes to the bottom of the list.  It would be very useful to be able to sort in alphabetical order, or by client.

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: When an project/board is created, each new one just goes to the bottom of the list. It would be very useful to be able to sort in alphabetical order, or by client.
